title: SMP Necessities
description: This modpack adds all the mods you could possibly need to start playing on an smp.
body:
💎 SMP Necessities: The Definitive QoL Modpack 💎
Essential Performance and Feature Mods for Collaborative Survival
SMP Necessities is the carefully curated modpack designed to provide the absolute best, most stable experience for any Survival Multiplayer (SMP) server. We focus strictly on the necessities: optimizing performance, adding crucial quality-of-life tools, and enhancing player interaction, all while maintaining the core challenge of vanilla Minecraft.

Key Features for a Perfect Server Experience:

🚀 Unmatched Performance: Includes industry-leading optimization mods like Sodium, Lithium, and Starlight to ensure high, stable frame rates and minimal server lag, even on lower-end hardware.

🗺️ Critical Quality of Life: Never get lost again with JourneyMap for reliable world mapping and waypoints. Quickly check item recipes and block information with an advanced overlay.

🛠️ Streamlined Interaction: Features like advanced Inventory Sorting and Tree Chopping utilities remove tedious grinding, letting you focus on building and exploring with your friends.

🗣️ Immersive Communication: Integrated Proximity Voice Chat makes base building and adventuring feel natural and engaging.

SMP Necessities is the ultimate upgrade for groups who love vanilla survival but demand modern performance and essential features. It's the modpack your server needs.
